Nonetheless, the code itself does not contain any malicious patterns or vulnerabilities.\n\n---\n\n### **My overall estimate:**\n\n- **Malware score:** **0** — no malicious activity detected.\n- **Obfuscated score:** **0** — clear, un-obfuscated code.\n- **Risk score:** **0.1** — very low, typical for build artifacts with embedded source maps, but should be managed carefully in production environments.\n\n---\n\n### **Summary:**\nThe reports are consistent with the actual code.
